title: T-073 — Costing 9-step waterfall + scenario Server Action (NPD-h)
prompt:
# T-073 — Costing waterfall action

PRD: 01-NPD-PRD.md §17.11.3
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Action computeCosting(productCode, scenario) → 9-step waterfall persisted to costing_breakdowns + costing_waterfall_steps. Implements V07 margin warn (<15%) and HARD FAIL (<0%) per §17.11.3.

## Implementation contract
1. packages/domain/src/costing/compute-waterfall.ts: pure function computeWaterfall(rawCost, yieldPct, params, scenario) → array of 9 steps with delta_pct.
2. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/_actions/compute.ts: Server Action invoking helper + UPSERT into costing_breakdowns + replaces costing_waterfall_steps within transaction; reads margin warn threshold from Reference.AlertThresholds.
3. apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/_actions/save-scenario.ts: Server Action persisting a what-if scenario by name + parameters.
4. Vitest covers 9-step ordering, delta correctness, V07 warn vs fail boundaries, scenario UPSERT idempotency.

## Files
- packages/domain/src/costing/compute-waterfall.ts [create]
- packages/domain/src/costing/__tests__/compute-waterfall.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/_actions/compute.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/_actions/save-scenario.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/(npd)/pipeline/[projectId]/costing/_actions/__tests__/compute.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given a fixed input (rawCost=10, yieldPct=90, target margin=20), when computeWaterfall runs, then it returns 9 steps in correct order (Raw materials → Yield loss → Process labour → Packaging → Overhead → Logistics → Margin → Distributor → Retail) with delta_pct values per §17.11.3
2. Given a scenario produces margin_pct=10, when computeCosting commits, then the row is flagged warn (margin < 15% threshold) per §17.11.3 V07 warn rule (Reference.AlertThresholds value)
3. Given a scenario produces margin_pct=-5, when computeCosting runs, then it returns FAIL status (margin < 0%) and refuses to commit per §17.11.3 hard-fail rule

## Test strategy
- RED: __tests__/compute-waterfall.test.ts + __tests__/compute.test.ts asserting 9-step order + warn/fail thresholds before functions exist
- Run 'pnpm --filter domain test compute-waterfall && pnpm --filter web test compute'

## Risk red lines
- Do not commit waterfall when margin < 0%
- Do not hardcode threshold (must read Reference.AlertThresholds)
- Do not allow steps out of canonical 9-step order
